message:
test(ftui-harness): add 17 flicker detection property tests

First property tests for ftui-harness covering FlickerDetector
state machine invariants: crash resistance on arbitrary input,
determinism, frame/byte accounting bounds, sync coverage range,
bracketed frame correctness, sync gap detection, frame ID
monotonicity, finalize semantics, chunked vs single-shot
equivalence, and partial/full erase classification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
